## Summary

Describe the problem in one or two sentences.

## Steps To Reproduce

1. Go to ...
2. Click ...
3. Run ...
4. See error ...

## Expected Behavior

Describe what you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

Describe what actually happened.

## Screenshots

If available, add screenshots or screen recordings.

## System Info

Please open `Help -> System Info`, click `Copy Info`, and paste the output here.

```text
Paste System Info output here
```

## Logs

If available, include:

- log file path
- relevant log excerpt

Default log location on Windows:

```text
%LOCALAPPDATA%\AdminAssistant\admin_assistant.log
```

```text
Paste relevant log lines here
```

## Environment Details

Please share anything relevant about your environment, for example:

- Windows version
- Python version if running from source
- install method: installer or source
- AI provider in use: OpenAI / Ollama / compatible
- target host type if the issue is SSH-related

## Additional Context

Add any other context that may help reproduce or diagnose the problem.
